name: AegisScan
description: Trigger an Aegis security scan for this commit or pull request.
author: Aegis

inputs.name: aegis-api-key
inputs.label: Aegis API key
inputs.helpMarkDown: API key with scan:trigger scope. Reference a secret variable, e.g. $(AEGIS_API_KEY).

inputs.name: source-id
inputs.label: Aegis source ID
inputs.helpMarkDown: Aegis source identifier for this repository.

inputs.name: wait
inputs.label: Wait for completion
inputs.helpMarkDown: Wait for the scan to complete and surface findings.

inputs.name: fail-on
inputs.label: Fail on severity
inputs.helpMarkDown: Severity threshold that fails this task.

inputs.name: poll-timeout-seconds
inputs.label: Poll timeout (seconds)
inputs.helpMarkDown: Maximum seconds to wait for scan completion when wait=true.
